title: dc-validate workflow nullglob hardening
diff_summary: Added `shopt -s nullglob` at the top of three `run:` blocks in dc-validate.yml.

spec_acceptance_criteria_met.AC1_empty_workers_passes: verified — local bash test with shopt -s nullglob iterates zero times
spec_acceptance_criteria_met.AC2_valid_manifest_passes: asserted by inspection — nullglob only affects empty-match case
spec_acceptance_criteria_met.AC3_missing_manifest_still_fails: asserted by inspection — step 1 checks per-dir, dir loop unchanged
spec_acceptance_criteria_met.AC4_missing_field_still_fails: asserted by inspection — python field check unchanged
spec_acceptance_criteria_met.AC5_minimal_additive: verified — three +1 line additions, no semantic change to existing logic

rounds.note: sandbox helper errors during file-listing exec calls did not block verdict

local_nullglob_pass.command: bash -c 'shopt -s nullglob; FAIL=0; for manifest in workers/*/MANIFEST.json; do echo ITER: $manifest; FAIL=2; done; echo EXIT_CODE=$FAIL (expect 0)'

local_baseline_no_nullglob_fail.command: bash -c 'FAIL=0; for manifest in workers/*/MANIFEST.json; do echo ITER: $manifest; FAIL=2; done; echo EXIT_CODE=$FAIL (no nullglob -> expect 2)'
